The way that we solve for like hitting a higher bar when it comes to technical content, because we've worked with a ton of different clients who are very technical, think about, right, abnormal security, surge AI, augment code.
Part of it is the context engineering that we do up front, and what we call our strategy sprint.
In our strategy sprint, we create these artifacts around your products and services, your company, your ICP, and then your brand voice and any specific guidelines when it comes to what we write.
And then from there.
